layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the market — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deep in 'Extreme Fear' territory and getting worse. Almost every coin on our watchlist is in a downtrend with bearish chart patterns. While some coins like ETH and BONK are getting close to oversold levels, none of them have shown convincing signs of a bottom yet — prices are still below their key moving averages and sellers remain in control. Catching a falling knife in this environment is high risk.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. Set price alerts for ETH around $1,800 (key support) and watch for a stabilization signal before committing capital. This is a market that rewards patience, not urgency.
expert_reasoning: I evaluated all nine candidates and found no compelling entry. BONK has the most oversold RSI (31) but its chart is strongly bearish (-2.0 bias) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — a textbook capitulation pattern that often has further to fall. DEXE is overbought at RSI 71 after a 63% 5-day run. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but it's already up 21% in 7 days with a terrible risk/reward ratio of 0.38x to nearest resistance — classic case of chasing. ETH is the strongest fundamental candidate with RSI approaching oversold and $1,800 support nearby, but it's still below all major MAs with a -0.70 chart bias. High BTC dominance at 56.4% signals capital rotation away from alts, making altcoin longs especially risky. The worsening Fear & Greed trend (25, down from 27 yesterday) suggests the selling isn't done.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear is worsening — could cascade into deeper selloff across alts before any bounce materializes
BTC dominance at 56.4% is actively compressing altcoin valuations, and BTC itself is flat — no rising tide to lift boats
No confirmed reversal patterns on any candidate — entering now is catching a falling knife
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with volume confirmation could trigger a BUY signal
Fear & Greed index — a turn from 25 back above 30 would suggest selling exhaustion
BTC dominance trend — any decline below 55% would signal rotation back into alts
market_context: The market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) and worsening, with BTC holding relatively flat at $63,920 while alts bleed. High BTC dominance at 56.4% makes altcoin swing trades particularly dangerous right now.
context_banner: Extreme Fear with no confirmed bottoming signals — capital preservation takes priority over opportunity hunting.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25 and worsening from 27 yesterday — the market is not done selling yet, making premature entries risky.
ETH RSI at 39 is approaching oversold but not there yet; BONK at 31 is near oversold but chart structure is strongly bearish with capitulation candles.
Every candidate with chart data shows bearish or strongly bearish bias except LDO (+0.85) which is already extended +21% in 7 days with poor R/R.
ETH derivatives reset article suggests positioning is getting cleaner, but this is a forward-looking setup not yet actionable.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors could add sell pressure as recovered funds hit the market, contributing to the fearful environment.
